---
title: "Séminaire des étudiants de la Chaire CARA"
subtitle: |
  | Modélisation bayésienne en actuariat
  | Anne Paquet, UQAM 
date: 2022-09-28
toc: TRUE
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

:::


::: {.column width="2%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](../../img/AnneP.png)
:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::::
